mapper.select:
SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_ORDER_GOODS_IDX1)*/ TYPE, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_ORDER_CODE', 'TYPE', TYPE) TYPE_NM, CD, CD_NM, OP1, F_GET_ORDER_CD_NM(TYPE, 'OP1', OP1) OP1_NM, OP2, F_GET_ORDER_CD_NM(TYPE, 'OP2', OP2) OP2_NM, OP3, F_GET_ORDER_CD_NM(TYPE, 'OP3', OP3) OP3_NM, SALE_AMT, TOT_CNT, IN_CNT, OUT_CNT, CLOSE_CNT, SHOW_FLAG, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(REG_ADMIN) REG_ADMIN_NM, TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REG_DT, REMARK FROM PPS_ORDER_GOODS A WHERE TYPE IS NOT NULL AND REG_DT > TO_DATE('20170701', 'YYYYMMDD')
AND CD LIKE '%' || #{searchSValue} || '%'
AND CD_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchSValue} || '%'
AND TYPE = #{searchType}
AND CD = #{searchPopCd}
AND TOT_CNT > 0
AND TOT_CNT = 0

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_ORDER_GOODS_IDX1)*/ TYPE, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_ORDER_CODE', 'TYPE', TYPE), '-') TYPE_NM, NVL(CD, '-') CD, NVL(CD_NM, '-') CD_NM, NVL(OP1, '-') OP1, NVL(F_GET_ORDER_CD_NM(TYPE, 'OP1', OP1), '-') OP1_NM, NVL(OP2, '-') OP2, NVL(F_GET_ORDER_CD_NM(TYPE, 'OP2', OP2), '-') OP2_NM, NVL(OP3, '-') OP3, NVL(F_GET_ORDER_CD_NM(TYPE, 'OP3', OP3), '-') OP3_NM, NVL(SALE_AMT, 0) SALE_AMT, NVL(TOT_CNT, 0) TOT_CNT, NVL(IN_CNT, 0) IN_CNT, NVL(OUT_CNT, 0) OUT_CNT, NVL(CLOSE_CNT, 0) CLOSE_CNT, NVL(SHOW_FLAG, '-') SHOW_FLAG, NVL(F_GET_ADMIN_NM(REG_ADMIN), '-') REG_ADMIN_NM, NVL(TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') REG_DT, NVL(REMARK, '-') REMARK FROM PPS_ORDER_GOODS WHERE TYPE IS NOT NULL AND REG_DT > TO_DATE('20170701', 'YYYYMMDD')
AND CD LIKE '%' || #{searchSValue} || '%'
AND CD_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchSValue} || '%'
AND TYPE = #{searchType}
AND TOT_CNT > 0
AND TOT_CNT = 0
SELECT RPRSEN_NM, TELNUM, TRIM('(' || ZIPCD || ') ' || ADDR1 || ADDR2) AGENT_ADDR FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{agentId}
SELECT SEND_ORG_FILE, REMARK, REQ_REMARK FROM PPS_ORDER_INFO WHERE ORDER_NO = #{orderNo}
